title: Kuhru
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:MajorKuhrusMajorBooboo-MSW51.jpg]] |name=Kuhru |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], near the [[Patriim system/Legends|Patriim system]][[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Dialogue|Vader|You seem distraught, Major. Perhaps a long walk and some fresh air would help clear your mind.|Kuhru|A walk? B-but, my lord, I don't see what—|Vader|''Major!''|Kuhru|Yes…walk…fresh…air…walk…yes…air…walk…mmm…yes…nice…|Officer|Lord Vader! Our instruments indicate that an exterior airlock has just opened and closed—of its own ''volition!''|Vader|How curious. A faulty mechanism, no doubt.|Crewman|Oh. Y-yes, sir. Of course.|attr=Darth Vader deals with Kuhru's failure|src=}} '''Kuhru''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and a distinguished [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] commander. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Kuhru was serving on a [[Unidentified overgrown mudball|backwater world]] when his forces confronted [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who was [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] as a potential location for a Rebel base. Kuhru was tasked by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] with capturing the intruder alive, but the young Rebel fled the world, leaving the Major to face Vader's wrath. Aboard the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], Kuhru reported the outcome of the skirmish to Vader, who, displeased, [[Mind trick/Legends|convinced]] the Major to step out an [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]] without a [[Environment suit/Legends|space suit]]. Kuhru's career ended when he was sucked out into the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Major Kuhru, do you mean to tell me that you had a Rebel officer within your grasp… and you let him slip away?''"
"''B-but, my lord—we were tricked! And we had to protect our communications beacon—it was a matter of priorities! Surely you underst—|Darth Vader and Kuhru|}} Kuhru was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] serving as a [[Major/Legends|major]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. A noted [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]], Kuhru was stationed on a [[Unidentified overgrown mudball|backwater planet]] that housed both an Imperial base and a [[Communications beacon/Legends|communications beacon]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], in his search for a suitable world on which to establish a Rebel base, was [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] the planet on which Kuhru served, only to discover—and be discovered by—the Imperial presence there. As an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] [[Walker/Legends|walker]] moved to engage him, the scout walker's crew alerted the main base, which promptly dispatched a force of AT-ATs led by Kuhru to confront the intruder. The [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], unaware that the Rebel was Skywalker, ordered Kuhru to take the insurgent alive for interrogation. [[File:Kuhru_in_AT-AT.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Kuhru orders the AT-ST to destroy Skywalker's starfighter.]] The Major instructed the AT-ST to destroy Skywalker's [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] and thereby trap the Rebel on the planet, but Kuhru quickly re-tasked the scout walker with defending the communications beacon when Skywalker moved to destroy it with [[Proton grenade/Legends|proton grenades]]. The attack proved to be a feint, as Skywalker immobilized the AT-ST with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before escaping the world in his [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]]. Kuhru's AT-ATs were unable to shoot down the craft as it fled, leaving the Major to report to Vader with news of the failure. Kuhru traveled to the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']], Vader's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], to deliver his report in person, boarding the [[Warship/Legends|warship]] as it neared the [[Patriim system/Legends|Patriim system]]. The Major met with the Dark [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] aboard the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|Super Star Destroyer's]] [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]], where he attempted to defend his decision to protect the communications beacon to Vader. However, the Dark Lord disagreed with Kuhru's assessment of the situation. Rather than execute the [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] on the spot for his failure to capture the Rebel, Vader used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to [[Mind trick/Legends|convince]] Kuhru to walk out of one of the ''Executor''{{'s}} [[Airlock/Legends|airlocks]] without a [[Environment suit/Legends|space suit]]. The Major complied and was propelled into the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]] of [[Realspace/Legends|space]], killing himself in the process. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|I don't think Vader is going to ''like'' this, sir.''"
"''Corporal, if you value what's left of your career, just… drive.|Kuhru confers with an AT-AT pilot following Skywalker's escape|}} A distinguished Imperial Army commander, Major Kuhru was charged with leading AT-AT forces into combat on the planet on which he was stationed. When confronted by Luke Skywalker, the Major attempted to capture the [[Alliance Military/Legends|Rebel officer]] per [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] Vader's orders. Kuhru's efforts failed when he deemed the protection of the planet's communications beacon to be of a higher priority, a judgment that provided Skywalker an opportunity to escape. A shaken Kuhru attempted to defend his decision to Vader on the ''Executor'', but the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] disagreed with the situation and compelled the Major to get "some fresh air" by walking out of an airlock. ==Behind the scenes== Major Kuhru appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Resurrection of Evil'']], the fifty-first issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], written by [[David Michelinie]] and illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]]. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' (1977) 51]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 51}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{GalaxyCite|11|ComicScan|ComicScan: Paint Him Black}} {{Imo}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Kuhru }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
